TextView.android:text: Root Checker
Root: not checked
System Analyzer
Hardware, CPU, GPU, RAM, storage, and developer-state snapshot.
Tap Refresh for system snapshot.
Activity Manager
View installed app activities, expand an app row, and launch exported activity components for quick diagnostics.
Filter Results
Tap Refresh to load app activities.
Intent Tester
Build, launch, capture, and generate manifest snippets for intent testing. Receiver templates stay separate from the launcher workflow.
Intent Launcher
Build and launch explicit or action-based intents. Save common launch configs as named presets for quick reuse.

com.google.android.material.textfield.Te.app:helperText: Pick common categories or long-press for custom comma/newline text.
Names like NEW_TASK, CLEAR_TOP, or numeric values like 0x10000000
One per line: key=value, s:key=value, i:count=1, b:enabled=true

TextView.android:text: Fill package/class or action/data, then launch. Saved intents are stored locally in PermsTest settings.
Intent Receiver

Enable installed receiver handlers, then open another app/browser/file manager to test whether PermsTest appears as a handler. Custom filters still generate manifest snippets until APK repack support is wired.
Custom filter

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: Prefer capture over built-in PermsTest handlers while active

TextView.android:text: Checked templates can be enabled as installed PermsTest receiver aliases. Custom filters are copied as snippets until repack support is wired.
Captured events
No captured receiver events yet.
Permissions Tester
Select permissions and create either a launchable generated test app, a manifest-only install test, or a signed permission repack of one selected APK.

com.google.android.material.textfield.Te.app:helperText: Auto-fills for generated modes. 3rd Party Apps keeps the selected APK package while this stays as a manifest/snippet reference.

TextView.android:text: Selected APK: PermsTest generated test package
Launchable app creates a real generated test app. Manifest-only installs a no-code package for manifest/package-manager checks. 3rd Party Apps repacks the selected single APK.
Hex Editor

Browse or enter a file path, load a bounded file window, inspect aligned offset/hex/ASCII rows, select byte/word/dword/qword ranges, copy/cut/paste bytes, patch hex or ASCII, then save the changed window. SAF-picked files use bounded descriptor reads and writes so large documents are not staged into app storage.

Memory Mode lists running packages only and opens the existing Memory tab Hex Editor for the selected target. File load/save stays disabled while this gate is on so file edits and live memory writes never mix.
Hex bytes
File mode is ready. Enter a path, then Load a bounded file window.
Text Editor

Open a text file or external document URI, edit plain text by default, and optionally view the same content with shell, JSON, web, or smali syntax highlighting. Large files use the shared virtual line editor instead of one giant text field.
Text editor ready.
Save Data Editor
Select a package, load save-edit JSON configs from /sdcard/dev.perms.test/save_data/[package_name], then back up and apply section-scoped byte edits through the selected backend.

com.google.android.material.checkbox.Mat.android:text: Allow any file in save data directory

TextView.android:text: Save data configs are stored under /sdcard/dev.perms.test/save_data/[package_name].
Screenshot Tool
Capture the current screen through the selected shell backend, schedule a delayed capture, then open the latest screenshot to drag-select, measure, copy coordinates, or save a crop.
Screenshots are saved under /sdcard/dev.perms.test/screenshots. Requires a shell-capable backend for screencap.
